events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Browse our upcoming events and join us.
events.noEvents: No events available at the moment.
events.noEventsFound: No events found matching your criteria.

event.eventHasFinished: This event has already taken place.

errors.fetchEvents: There was an error fetching event data. Please try again.
errors.fetchEvent: There was an error fetching the event details. Please try again.
errors.fetchRegistrations: Could not load your registrations. Please try again.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your mobile number to receive a verification code.
auth.otpSubtitle: A code has been sent to
auth.otpSentDescription: Check your messages for the verification code

errors.invalidMobile: Please enter a valid 11-digit mobile number (e.g., 09123456789).

registration.title: Event Registration
registration.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to start over? All your entered data for this registration will be lost.

steps.personalSubtitle: Please enter your information as it appears on your official documents.
steps.educationSubtitle: Please provide your educational and professional background.
steps.languageSubtitle: Help us understand your language proficiency and how you found us.
steps.rulesSubtitle: Please review and accept the terms to continue.
steps.summarySubtitle: Please review your information before proceeding to payment.

fields.referralSource: How did you hear about us?
fields.acceptRules: I have read and accept the {terms} and {privacy}.

descriptions.mobileReadOnly: Your mobile number is tied to your account and cannot be changed.
descriptions.emailOptional: Optional. We'll use this for event updates.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.rulesRequired: You must accept the terms and policies to continue.

errors.notAuthenticated: You must be logged in to register for an event.
errors.missingInfo: Event or ticket information is missing. Please try again from the event page.
errors.incompleteSteps: Please complete all previous steps before proceeding.

payment.invalidRequestDescription: Could not verify payment. The link may be invalid or expired.
payment.successDescription: Your registration is complete. You will receive a confirmation email shortly with all the details.
payment.failedDescription: Your payment could not be processed. Please try again or go back to review your registration details.
payment.alreadyProcessedDescription: This payment has already been finalized with a status of:
payment.howToJoinDescription: The link to join the online event will be sent to you via SMS and email one day before the event.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: View and edit your profile information. This information will be used to pre-fill event registrations.
profile.mobileReadOnly: Your mobile number is your unique identifier and cannot be changed.
profile.updateSuccessDescription: Your information has been saved successfully.

dashboard.myRegistrationsSubtitle: Here are the events you've registered for.
dashboard.noRegistrations: You haven't registered for any events yet.

evaluation.title: Event Feedback
evaluation.subtitle: Thank you for attending {eventName}. Please share your feedback.
evaluation.alreadySubmittedDescription: Thank you, you have already submitted your feedback for this event.

errors.loginPrompt: You must be logged in to submit feedback for this event.
errors.notEligibleDescription: You are not eligible to submit feedback. You must have a paid registration and the event must be over.
errors.formNotFound: Could not load the evaluation form. It may not be available for this event.

create.title: Create New Event
create.subtitle: Fill in the details to create a new event.
create.successDescription: The event '{eventName}' has been successfully created.

edit.title: Edit Event
edit.subtitle: You are editing the event: {eventName}
edit.successDescription: The event '{eventName}' has been successfully updated.

form.title: Event Title
form.categoriesDesc: Comma-separated list of categories (e.g., Tech, Communication).
form.endDateTimeOptional: Optional. Leave empty if the event has no fixed end time.
form.showRemainingCapacityDesc: Display the number of available spots on the event page.

validation.nonNegative: Capacity must be a non-negative number.

tickets.title: Manage Tickets
tickets.subtitle: Configure ticket types for the event: {eventName}
tickets.endDateDesc: Optional. After this date, early bird tickets cannot be purchased.
tickets.saveSuccessDescription: Ticket settings for {eventName} have been saved.

resources.title: Manage Resources
resources.subtitle: Add or edit resources for: {eventName}
resources.noResources: No resources have been added to this event yet.
resources.deleteConfirmText: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the resource.

hero.title: Where Conversations Spark Change
hero.subtitle: Join a diverse community of thinkers and engage in meaningful conversations that matter.

involved.title: Get Involved
involved.subtitle: We believe in the power of community. Here’s how you can be a part of ours.
involved.collaborateDesc: Partner with us to host events and workshops.
involved.ideasDesc: Share your ideas for new event topics and formats.
involved.sponsorshipDesc: Support our mission and reach a dedicated audience.

moments.title: Captured Moments
moments.subtitle: Glimpses from our past events and gatherings.

experience.title: The Experience
experience.subtitle: More than just talks, our events are about connection and growth.

perk1.title: Connect
perk1.desc: Meet and network with like-minded individuals from various fields.

perk2.title: Learn
perk2.desc: Gain new perspectives and insights from expert speakers and peers.

perk3.title: Grow
perk3.desc: Develop your communication and critical thinking skills in a supportive environment.

simulation.quote: This is a simulated dialogue. In a real event, you'd be part of a dynamic, engaging conversation. Each event is a unique opportunity to explore new ideas and connect with others on a deeper level.
simulation.caption: Simulated conversation from a past event.
